hero.title: How to start playing Bingo 101?
hero.text: Every day, thousands of people visit the mirror of the official website of one of the most famous bookmakers on the planet — welcome to Bingo 101, always available for those who love to place profitable bets!

registration.title: How to Register on Bingo 101
steps: Visit the official Bingo 101 website (recommended to find via search engines)
Choose a registration method: by phone number, email, or via social networks
Fill out the registration form with your personal details
Confirm account creation via SMS or email
registration.important: For the latest registration instructions, visit the official Bingo 101 website or contact their support. We do not register users.

advantages.title: Advantages of Bingo 101
items: Wide betting line with extensive match coverage
Variety of payment systems for deposits and withdrawals
Mobile apps for all major platforms
Bonus program for new and regular clients

license.title: License & Security
license.text: According to open sources, Bingo 101 operates under a Curacao government license. The platform is owned by a trusted international holding company.
measures: SSL connection for secure financial transactions
Privacy policy compliant with international standards
license.important: We cannot confirm or guarantee the accuracy of license and security information. For official details, visit the Bingo 101 website or contact their support.

payments.title: Financial Operations
depositMethods: Electronic wallets (WebMoney, YooMoney, Payeer, ECO, etc.)
payments.withdrawal: According to user reviews, withdrawal requests on Bingo 101 can take up to 72 hours to process. For the first withdrawal, identity verification is usually required.
payments.note: For current terms (fees, limits, processing times), visit the official Bingo 101 website.

bonuses.title: Bonus Program
items: Welcome Bonus: bonus on first deposit for new users
Enhanced Odds: special offers on certain events
Loyalty Program: points accumulation and exchange for bonuses
Promo Codes: regular promotions tied to sports events
Cashback: partial refund of lost funds
bonuses.note: Terms and conditions may change. For current info, check the 'Promotions' section on the official website.

sports.title: Sports Line
betTypes: Singles: bet on one sports event
Express: combination of several events with multiplied odds
Systems: combination of expresses with partial win
Live: bets in real-time during matches

mirror.title: What is a Mirror?
mirror.text: Due to legal restrictions in some regions, access to the main Bingo 101 website may be limited. In such cases, users look for 'mirrors' — alternative domains that lead to the same platform.
mirror.note: We do not provide direct links to mirrors and are not a mirror. For access information, contact Bingo 101 support via official channels or use search queries.

mobile.title: Mobile Solutions
items: Android App: available for download from the official website
iOS App: for iPhone and iPad
Mobile Website: adaptive version for browsers
mobile.note: For the official app, visit the Bingo 101 website. Downloading from unofficial sources may pose security risks. We do not distribute mobile apps.

support.title: Support Service
channels: Online chat: available on the official website
support.note: According to reviews, Bingo 101 support works 24/7 and provides consultations in multiple languages.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
portal: A mirror or alternative domain of Bingo 101
A partner, affiliate or representative of Bingo 101
A platform for placing bets or conducting gambling
provide: Informational reviews based on open sources
disclaimer.responsibleGambling: Gambling can be addictive. Play responsibly and only with money you can afford to lose. Persons under 18 are not allowed to participate in gambling activities.
disclaimer.fullDisclaimer: This site is an independent information portal. We do not represent the official interests of Bingo 101 and are not affiliated with any operators.
doNot: Do not accept bets on sports events
Do not provide access to gambling games
Are not an App Download or representative
disclaimer.copyright: All trademarks, logos and brands (including Bingo 101) belong to their respective owners and are used exclusively for informational and review purposes in accordance with fair use principles.
disclaimer.en: This website is an independent information resource. We are not an official representative of the brands mentioned and are not affiliated with them. All trademarks, logos and brands belong to their respective owners and are used for informational purposes only. We do not accept bets or conduct gambling operations.

footer.bottomText: Not affiliated with Bingo 101. Independent informational resource.
